title: Craftable Spawn Eggs
description: adds recipes for almost every spawn egg
body:
This mod adds recipes for almost every spawn egg. The recipes require a diamond and items that
you get by killing the mod or items from their biome.

you can see all the recipes here : [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/18FUSq4X5x0bB5Iv3RP2wjFyPMxnyBgqtIkVGBQdlShM/edit#gid=0](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/18FUSq4X5x0bB5Iv3RP2wjFyPMxnyBgqtIkVGBQdlShM/edit#gid=0)

The recipes will also show up with JEI


I am working on mods that will change the diamond for a chicken egg for a cheaper variant,
and a mod that will have you only require an egg and 1 item for even easier recipes.

Willing to change a recipe if someone wants that, reach out through discord
adindax
